personalInfo.headline: AI Engineer & Technology Leader — Building Intelligent Products at Scale

summary.shortBio: Hanif Radityo is an AI-focused technology leader with deep experience in machine learning, computer vision, NLP, and production AI systems—from proof-of-concept to enterprise deployment.
summary.professionalStatement: Rizq is written. Effort is my responsibility.
summary.profileDescription: Specializes in designing and shipping AI-driven products: LLM integrations, sentiment analysis, OCR, chatbots, facial recognition, and real-time computer vision. Combines hands-on ML engineering (TensorFlow, YOLO, Flask/Python pipelines) with full-stack delivery (Laravel, React, Vue) and data platforms (Google BigQuery). Experienced leading AI startup incubation, mentoring 40+ developers in AI projects, and bridging research prototypes with scalable SaaS and government/enterprise solutions.

details: Thesis: SIBI sign language recognition using real-time computer vision and machine learning (A–Z alphabet classification).

workExperience.summary: Leads company strategy with emphasis on AI-enabled software solutions, intelligent automation, and technology services for clients.
responsibilities: Drive product and technical direction for AI-capable software solutions and client-facing technology services.
Align business execution with emerging AI tooling (LLM APIs, automation, data-driven products).
Oversee strategic execution, client alignment, and delivery of intelligent digital platforms.

workExperience.summary: Leads platform engineering for impacthink.com, including scalable architecture and data-driven features for the learning ecosystem.
responsibilities: Architect, build, and maintain the core e-learning platform with analytics and engagement tracking.
Define technical roadmap incorporating modern AI-assisted development and automation practices.
Ensure platform reliability, scalability, and alignment with organizational learning objectives.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver personalized, data-informed learning experiences.
Establish long-term technical foundation for evolving intelligent platform capabilities.

workExperience.summary: Led technical delivery of a Laboratory Information System evaluation product aligned with Common Criteria and ISO/IEC 27001.
responsibilities: Coordinated technical implementation for a regulated laboratory information system evaluation product.
Ensured solution architecture met security, compliance, and audit requirements.
Engaged stakeholders through requirements workshops, presentations, and live demonstrations.

workExperience.summary: Delivered end-to-end solutions in an IT consulting environment, with strong focus on large-scale data processing and analytics-ready pipelines.
responsibilities: Processed and optimized large-scale datasets (millions of records) using Google BigQuery for analytics and reporting.
Improved query performance, ETL-style data workflows, and structures supporting downstream ML and BI use cases.
Developed full-stack components, integrations, and production deployments for enterprise clients.
Contributed to business analysis, strategic discussions, and presales for data-intensive solutions.

workExperience.summary: Led application modernization for Telkomsel’s internal Verona vendor management system.
responsibilities: Provided technical direction and hands-on development throughout the enhancement lifecycle.
Translated business requirements into scalable technical implementations.
Managed backend engineering, DevOps, deployment pipelines, monitoring, and production stability.

workExperience.summary: Maintained mission-critical Telkomsel enterprise applications across development, staging, and production.
responsibilities: Ensured application stability, reliability, and continuous improvement in high-traffic environments.
Resolved production issues in coordination with IT users, business teams, and developers.
Managed deployments and regression testing for seamless enterprise operations.

workExperience.summary: CTO of an AI startup incubation born from UPN Veteran Jakarta’s AI Creation competition—leading end-to-end AI product development from PoC to production exploration.
responsibilities: Architected and delivered AI products: WhatsApp-integrated chatbots (rule-based + TensorFlow), real-time OCR (YOLO + TensorFlow), sentiment analysis engines, automated traffic surveillance, and facial recognition systems.
Led proof-of-concept validation and iteration for multiple AI SaaS ideas before market fit assessment.
Directed technical innovation across computer vision, NLP, and conversational AI stacks (Flask/Python, ML models).
Mentored ~40 interns on ML pipelines, model integration, and industry-standard AI engineering practices.
Established development workflows bridging research prototypes and deployable AI services.

workExperience.summary: Mentored interns at PT Central Artificial Intelligence in Full Stack Development and Data Science.
responsibilities: Guided participants on ML-ready data workflows, analytical pipelines, and full-stack AI application development.
Delivered structured sessions on model integration, data preprocessing, and production-minded coding practices.
Supervised practical projects aligned with industry AI development standards.

workExperience.company: BISA AI Academy (PT BISA ARTIFISIAL INDONESIA)
workExperience.summary: Backend development within Indonesia’s leading AI academy ecosystem, supporting internal systems for AI education programs.
responsibilities: Implemented backend features for AI academy internal platforms.
Collaborated on project delivery in a production-oriented AI training environment.
Applied computer science fundamentals to real-world AI industry software development.

workExperience.summary: Creative production including graphic design and video editing.

projects.description: Unified HR platform for BGN: workforce, attendance, leave, documents with e-signature, finance, LMS, and assets. Complex multi-platform data integration and IoT-based attendance.
Centralized ferry port display system for real-time ship, dock, and service status. Admin dashboard, operator workflows, running text/media content, BMKG weather API, and read-only Open API.

projects.projectName: POC SIPGN SIPAI – AI Surveillance (SPPG Kitchens)
projects.description: Integrated AI surveillance for SPPG kitchens: CCTV management, YOLO-based PPE compliance detection, violation counting, and compliance dashboard.
Enterprise AI layer on existing CCTV: real-time PPE/safety detection, alert workflow, live monitoring, compliance analytics, and multi-site governance console.
Built backend services integrating OpenAI APIs for niche AI features embedded in daily-use applications—demonstrating production LLM integration patterns.
Real-time computer vision system recognizing Indonesian SIBI sign language alphabet (A–Z) via webcam capture, custom ML model training, and inference API.
AI-driven sentiment analysis platform evaluating public perception of consumer products by aggregating data from BPOM, Wikipedia, and Twitter, with automated sentiment classification.
SaaS OCR platform extracting text from images in real time using custom models built with YOLO object detection and TensorFlow.
SaaS AI chatbot integrated with WhatsApp, combining rule-based dialogue flows with TensorFlow-powered knowledge responses.
Web dashboard processing complex EMIS datasets (400+ fields, hundreds of thousands of records) for real-time educational insights—foundation for data-driven and ML-ready reporting.
API management platform connecting multiple Ministry databases with dynamic GraphQL-style queries—enabling unified data access for downstream analytics and integrations.
E-learning platform with automated certification, course delivery, content sales, and user engagement analytics.
Two-year modernization of Telkomsel’s legacy vendor management system—Yii2 refactor, Vue/Nuxt frontend, optimized multi-level approval workflows.

projects.projectName: SIANWAR BWI – Waqf Administration Information System
projects.description: Government system for nazir registration, replacements, ruislag, and seven-level approval with 40+ document types.
Hajj and Umrah package management with sales, commissions, and cost calculation.
Internal CRM and accounting for leads, projects, and finance operations.
ERP for manufacturing and trading: products, quotations, invoices, delivery orders, and vendor management.
School pick-up system with guardian verification for child safety.
Election platform supporting 2,000–3,000 concurrent users.
Legacy enterprise maintenance: PHP 7→8 migration, security fixes, performance optimization.
HR, payroll, and task management system.
Modern news and content delivery platform.
Responsive company profile sites for multiple organizations.
Standard SaaS point-of-sale platform.

certificationsAndTraining: BISA AI Academy — AI industry internship program
UPN Veteran Jakarta — AI Creation competition (PT Central Artificial Intelligence incubation origin)

notes: Profile repositioned toward AI engineering and AI product leadership based on documented experience.
AI projects listed first; enterprise/government projects retained for breadth.
Some employment dates overlap because of concurrent roles.
Validate contact fields before final CV export.
